name: mschwager
why_notable: Wrote the Python 3 rewrite of fierce — the version available via pip install fierce and actively maintained today. RSnake's original fierce.pl was a Perl script that went unmaintained; mschwager took the core logic (AXFR zone transfer attempt, wildcard detection, DNS brute-force, traverse/wide scan) and produced a clean, modern Python implementation. Made a decade-old DNS recon tool accessible to the current generation of pentesters.
